prompt: A [fashion item] worn by [figure type] against a [environment] backdrop — [lens] mid-distance, [figure type] not posed but caught mid-[movement type], [time of day] light hitting the [fashion item] at an angle that reveals its [material quality], the environment slightly out of focus behind them, the [fashion item] the sharpest element in the frame, cinematic fashion still, 16:9. Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
